docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT ANASAZI PROPERTIES
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ZACHARY STANZIANO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JANKE KEEFE IS NOT PRESENT. JOHN E. MCINERNEY APPEARED IN COURT AS DEFENDANT ALTHOUGH NOT NAMED AS A DEFENDANT. HE CLAIMED THAT DEFENDANT ANASAZI PROPERTIES IS NOT THE PROPER PARTY TO SUE. JOHN MCINERNEY ADMITTED IN COURT THAT HE IS THE LANDLORD/OWNER OF THE RENTED PROPERTY.PLAINTIFF AGREED AND HEARING PROCEEDED WITH JOHN MCINERNEY. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANZIANO, ZACHARY JANKE, KEEFE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANASAZI PROPERTIES MCINERNEY, JOHN E. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2026 - JUDGMENT.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR JOHN MCINERNEY FILED BY DEFENDANT ANASAZI PROPERTIES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOHN E. MCINERNEY FILED BY DEFENDANT ANASAZI PROPERTIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-09-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY STANZIANO, ZACHARY JANKE, KEEFE AS TO DEFENDANT ANASAZI PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ANASAZI PROPERTIES
